name: Gen Z Consulting Site
desc: A sleek, modern website for a growing consulting firm located in Gainesville. NextJS, Tailwind, and react-spring.
summary: A small statically-generated website for a growing consulting firm located in Gainesville. Bootstrapped with NextJS, uses TailwindCSS for styling, Unsplash and Pexel for images, React-Spring for page animations, and SendGrid for email sending."
lessons: GPT-4 is an excellent content-writing assistant.
SendGrid by Twilio has the best dev experience out of all the SMTP/email providers.
